Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "FLYINGFEATHERS-4000-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Flying Feathers.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4000 which sets $034C to $3D as it would be when actually loading from tape. This allows a protection check at $1BC1 to succeed.
